payload.title: R0006/R0005: justification comments stripped by lowering pass before linting
payload.description: R0006 (justify-allow) and R0005 (justify-unsafe) check for // reason: and // safety: comments within a 200-byte leading window. However, run_pipeline() lints the LOWERED source, from which proc_macro2/TokenStream serialization strips all comments. The rules always fire for any #[allow] or unsafe block in Rustricted-processed files, even with correct justification comments. Fix: pass original source string (with comments) to lint_strict() instead of the lowered source, or run lints BEFORE the lowering/comment-stripping step. Discovered during RT-12 heck case study.
